title: taraxacum selenolobum
intro: Taraxacum selenolobum, also known as the "Mongolian dandelion," is a species of flowering plant within the dandelion genus. It is a perennial plant native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum selenolobum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or supplements, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
